heading: Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
label: 100108 Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)10010836:1714 (1st sentence)., (1st sentence), .Nov. 20, 1981Pub. L. 97–82, § 1595 Stat. 1093
